signature_info.description: Asking Hopper Subset Macintsh Sms Televsion

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script execution in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Volume Shadow Copy Vsstrace.dll Load
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the image load of VSS DLL by uncommon executables

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Schtasks From Env Var Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects Schtask creations that point to a suspicious folder or an environment variable often used by malware

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Read Contents From Stdin Via Cmd.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect the use of "<" to read and potentially execute a file via cmd.exe

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Dropper Script Execution Via WScript/CScript
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects wscript/cscript executions of scripts located in user directories
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Margaritis Dimitrios (idea), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects scheduled task creations or modification to be run with high privileges on a suspicious schedule type
Detects the creation of scheduled tasks by user accounts via the "schtasks" utility.

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC Win.Ransomware.Sage variant outbound connection"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"Host: mbfce24rgn65bx3g.",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:impact_flag red,ruleset community; service:http; reference:url,www.virustotal.com/en/file/c1c31129a39441607c060a7da57855d3969cf47ce4119cda9beaf65b63faca60/analysis/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:42059; rev:2; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication administratively prohibited
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:116; sid:441; rev:2; msg:"(icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication administratively prohibited"; metadata: rule-type decode; classtype:attempted-recon;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication with destination host is administratively prohibited
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:116; sid:442; rev:2; msg:"(icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication with destination host is administratively prohibited"; metadata: rule-type decode; classtype:attempted-recon;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET COMPROMISED Known Compromised or Hostile Host Traffic group 2

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Destination Unreachable Host Unreachable"; icode:1; itype:3; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:399; rev:9; )

alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Destination Unreachable Network Unreachable"; icode:0; itype:3; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:401; rev:9; )
